element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single-game exhibition allows players to practice batting without progression pressure
Learned through immediate gameplay; arcade-style controls emphasized
Generic stadiums for most teams; some signature features (Wrigley Field ivy, Astrodome grass) affect play
Visual variant only; does not affect gameplay mechanics
Tampa Bay Devil Rays and Arizona Diamondbacks unlocked as late-game progression reward
Includes home run derby sub-mode; optional content
Specialized batting challenge; emphasis on power mechanics

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Inning-based pacing with arcade-style intensity; tension builds through game progression (9-inning structure); relief comes from successful plays and mode variety

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Stadium selection changes field layout and wall positioning; generic vs. authentic outfield configurations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Exhibition mode allows skill acquisition without penalty; franchise mode starts with selectable difficulty opponents
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through regular season matches; varying team strengths provide scaling challenge
difficulty_curve.late_game: 162-game season completion unlocks expansion teams (1998 teams); All-Star mode and home run derby provide alternate challenge modes

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct play modes: Franchise (season progression), MLB Challenge (competitively scaled), Exhibition (practice/single-game), All-Star with home run derby. Each mode presents different pacing and challenge curves.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Franchise mode: 162-game progression vs. Exhibition: single game

notable_level_patterns.description: 28 MLB stadiums feature partial authenticity: accurate batting-box view but generic outfield walls on most stadiums. Signature features (Wrigley ivy, Astrodome grass) create minor mechanical variation.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Wrigley Field (ivy visible from batter's box but removed from outfield wall)

notable_level_patterns.description: Completing full 162-game season unlocks anachronistic expansion teams (1998 Tampa Bay/Arizona) not available at start, extending replayability and providing late-game progression incentive.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tampa Bay Devil Rays and Arizona Diamondbacks (unlock condition: full season completion)
